        print(f'PID {d[\"pid\"]} PPID {d[\"ppid\"]} {d[\"name\"]}')
# Also check parent-child of suspicious processes

# PID 468 powershell

        print(f'  PID {d[\"pid\"]} {d[\"name\"]}')
print('PID 1744 (powershell) children:')
for d in data:
    if d.get('ppid') == 1744:
        print(f'  PID {d[\"pid\"]} {d[\"name\"]}')
print('PID 1744 (powershell) parent chain:')
# Go up the tree
pid = 1744
procs = {d['pid']: d for d in data}
while pid in procs:
    p = procs[pid]
    print(f'  PID {p[\"pid\"]} {p[\"name\"]}')
    pid = p.get('ppid', 0)
    if pid == 0:
